required_properties.description: A short, one-line summary of the announcement.
The date the announcement was made, in ISO 8601 format.

recommended_properties.description: The date the announcement expires or is no longer valid.
The full text of the announcement.
A URL with full details about the announcement.
The category of this announcement (e.g. https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q81068910 for COVID-related).

deprecation_note: Google retired SpecialAnnouncement rich results in 2025. This markup will not generate rich results.
